concepts.description: A legal or natural actor in the domain.

items.title: Create landlord
items.intent: Admin-only creation of a landlord record.

items.title: Create building
items.intent: Admin-only creation of a building and association to a landlord.

items.title: Create unit
items.intent: Admin-only creation of a unit and association to a building.

items.title: Admin update record
items.intent: Admin-only controlled update for any landlord-tenant system record.

items.title: Admin remove record
items.intent: Admin-only controlled removal for any landlord-tenant system record.

items.title: Create tenant
items.intent: Create a tenant record from structured agent input.

items.title: Assign tenant to unit
items.intent: Create an active tenancy for a tenant and rental unit.

items.title: Record rent payment
items.intent: Record a rent payment against an active tenancy.

items.title: Add maintenance request
items.intent: Add a maintenance request for a rental unit.

items.title: Update tenancy contract
items.intent: Operations role update of tenancy contract dates or status.

items.title: End tenancy contract
items.intent: Operations role termination of an active tenancy contract.

items.title: Update rent payment
items.intent: Finance role update of a rent payment status.

items.title: Handle maintenance request
items.intent: Maintenance role update of a maintenance request lifecycle status.

items.title: List active tenants
items.intent: Show all active tenants for a landlord.

items.title: Update tenant contact preference
items.intent: Update a tenant preferred contact method after schema migration.

roles.label: Admin
roles.description: Full administrative access to landlord, building, unit, tenancy, payment, and maintenance records.

roles.label: Maintenance
roles.description: Handle maintenance request intake and lifecycle updates.
